description: capital and most populous city of the Netherlands
description_wiki: Amsterdam (Dutch: [ˌɑmstərˈdɑm] ; lit. 'Dam in the Amstel') is the capital and largest city of the Netherlands.

description: one of the four autonomous countries of the Kingdom of the Netherlands; with territories in the Caribbean
description_wiki: The Netherlands, informally Holland, is a country in Northwestern Europe, with overseas territories in the Caribbean.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: male religious institute of the Roman Catholic Church

surface_forms: the great bank holiday in the United States
description_wiki: The Great Depression was a severe global economic downturn from 1929 to 1939.

description: dictator of Germany from 1933 to 1945, main instigator of World War II (1889–1945)
description_wiki: Adolf Hitler (20 April 1889 – 30 April 1945) was an Austrian-born  German politician who was the dictator of Germany during the Nazi era from 1933 until his suicide in 1945.
Java is one of the Greater Sunda Islands in the South East Asian country of Indonesia.

description: Dutch colony in Southeast Asia and Oceania (1800–1949)
description_wiki: The Dutch East Indies, also known as the Netherlands East Indies, was a Dutch colony with territory mostly comprising the modern state of Indonesia, which declared independence on 17 August 1945.

description: city in Central Java Province, Indonesia
description_wiki: Surakarta (Javanese: ꦯꦸꦫꦏꦂꦠ, Pegon: سوراكارتا), known colloquially as Solo (Javanese: ꦱꦭ; Sålå), is a major city in Central Java, Indonesia.

description: consolidated city and county in California, United States
description_wiki: San Francisco, officially the City and County of San Francisco, is the fourth-most populous city in California and the 17th-most populous in the United States, with a population of 826,079 in 2025.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki:
Florida (  FLORR-ih-də; Spanish: [floˈɾiða] ) is a state in the Southeastern and South Atlantic
regions of the United States.

description: city in and county seat of Santa Barbara County, California, United States
description_wiki: Santa Barbara (Spanish: Santa Bárbara, meaning 'Saint Barbara') is a coastal city in Santa Barbara County, California, of which it is also the county seat.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

description: city in and seat of San Bernardino County, California, United States
description_wiki: San Bernardino (  SAN BUR-nə-DEE-noh) is a city in and the county seat of San Bernardino County, California, United States.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: California () is a state in the Western United States that lies on the Pacific Coast.

The California Department of Social Services (CDSS) is a California state agency for many of the programs defined as part of the social safety net in the United States, and is within the auspices of the California Health and Human Services Agency.
